errors.slugInvalid: Name must start with a letter or digit and may contain only lowercase letters, digits, '-' or '_'.

codePicker.title: Code projects
codePicker.empty: No code projects yet. Add one to get started.

planningPicker.title: Planning projects
planningPicker.empty: No planning projects yet. Add one to get started.

newChatWithAgent.title: New chat with…
newChatWithAgent.description: Pick an agent. A fresh session opens, pre-bound to them.
newChatWithAgent.noAgents: No agents are linked to project {{project}}.

whiteboardPicker.title: Insert Whiteboard
whiteboardPicker.empty: No whiteboards in this project yet.
whiteboardPicker.liveTitle: Updates automatically when the whiteboard changes

script.scratchLabel: Scratch script (temp — hidden by default, no name required)

swimlane.groupHint: Lanes with the same group are visually grouped together on the board.
swimlane.autoRunLabel: Auto-run — scheduler will auto-run agent cards in this lane
swimlane.noAgentsHint: No agents are linked to this project. Link one in the Agents tab first.

project.descriptionPlaceholder: Short summary shown on the card
project.systemPromptPlaceholder: Instructions that apply to every chat in this project
project.appendMode: Append to base prompt (uncheck to replace)
project.lastNHint: How many recent user/assistant turns to replay verbatim. Leave blank to inherit.
project.recallKHint: How many BM25 + vector hits to inject. Leave blank to inherit.
project.languagesHint: Every entity is authored in one of these and auto-translated to the rest.
project.defaultLanguageHint: New entities created in this project start in this language unless the user has overridden their preferred language.
project.noAgentsHint: No agents yet. Create one in the Agents tab — it is auto-linked to the default project.
project.agentsHint: Checked agents can be mentioned with @name in this project's chats.
project.autoBuildHint: When on, the business.auto_build handler walks this project's contacts every six hours, derives organisations from the company field plus email/website domains, and enriches new rows via web_search. Off by default to keep web-tool cost predictable.
project.calendarHint: Non-working days specific to this project. Overrides the global calendar for all users working in this project.
project.errNameSlug: Name must be lowercase letters, digits, _ or - (max 63 chars).
project.errMemoryOverride: Memory overrides must be blank or a non-negative integer.
project.errLanguagePick: Pick at least one language for the project.
project.errDefaultLangNotInSet: Default language must be one of the selected languages.

agent.descriptionPlaceholder: What does this agent do? Shown in @-mention hints.
agent.appendMode: Append to base prompt (uncheck to fully replace)
agent.contextScopeOwn: Own — only sees its own prior turns
agent.knowsOtherAgents: Aware of other agents (injected into the prompt)
agent.isSubagent: Can be called as a subagent (via call_agent)
agent.noSubagentCandidates: No other agents are marked as subagent-callable yet.
agent.subagentsHint: When non-empty, this agent gains the call_agent tool.
agent.projectsHint: Which projects this agent is available in.
agent.lastNHint: Blank = inherit project / global. Set low (e.g. 0–2) for one-shot specialists.
agent.recallKHint: Blank = inherit. 0 disables recall entirely for this agent.
agent.errNameSlug: Name must be lowercase letters, digits, _ or - (max 63 chars).
agent.errMemoryOverride: Memory overrides must be blank or a non-negative integer.

card.noAgentsHint: No agents are linked to this project. Link one in the Agents tab first.
card.autoRunLabel: Auto-run — let the scheduler start this card on the next tick of the board.auto_run_scan task (the flag clears automatically once queued).
card.runTitle: Run this card with the assigned agent

feed.discoverHint: Paste a website URL to discover its feeds, or enter a feed URL directly.
feed.discoverNone: No feeds found on this page.
feed.patternSummary: Or pick from a known pattern (GitHub, Reddit, …)

site.intro: The agent checks this page periodically for changes. Only the LLM is called when content actually changes — ephemeral HTML differences (ads, timestamps) are filtered out first.

topic.descriptionPlaceholder: What this topic is about (helps the agent focus)
topic.agentHint: Only agents linked to this project are listed.
topic.termInputPlaceholder: Add a term and press Enter
topic.termsHint: Leave empty to let the agent propose terms on the first run.

skill.descriptionPlaceholder: What this skill does and when to use it
skill.errNameSlug: Name must be lowercase letters, digits, - or _ (1-63 chars)

codeProject.nameHint: Used as a directory name. Immutable after creation.
codeProject.gitUrlHint: Public repositories only (https:// or git://). Leave empty for a local-only scratch area.
codeProject.gitRefHint: Branch, tag or commit. Leave empty to follow the remote default.
codeProject.errGitUrlScheme: Git URL must start with https:// or git://.

planningProject.nameHint: Slug used in the URL and picker. Immutable after creation.
planningProject.startDateHint: Earliest date the scheduler will place wishes. Leave empty to use today.
planningProject.sprintDurationHint: Working days per sprint. 5 = weekly, 10 = bi-weekly, 15 = three weeks. Leave empty or 0 to disable sprint indicators.
planningProject.errStartDate: Start date must be in YYYY-MM-DD format.
planningProject.errSprintDuration: Sprint duration must be a number between 0 and 999.

composer.placeholder: Message bunny… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline, @ to mention)

sidebar.newQuickTitle: Start a Quick Chat — auto-hides after 15 min of inactivity

bubble.fork: Fork into a new Quick Chat
bubble.forkBtnTitle: Fork this conversation into a new Quick Chat with the edited message — does not modify the current session

askUser.pickMultipleTitle: Allow picking more than one option
askUser.errPickFirst: Pick an option or type an answer first.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.preferredLanguageHelp: Determines the language you author new entities in and the first tab shown when you open existing entities. If a project doesn't support this language, we use that project's default.
profile.defaultQuickChatHelp: Project (and its agents) used when the Electron tray spawns a Quick Chat. Leave empty to fall back to whichever project is active in the main window.

soul.heading: Personal style & background (soul)
soul.description: A short personality + style profile spliced into every chat's system prompt so assistants speak in the register you prefer. Auto-curated hourly from your messages; edit freely — your text is the seed for the next refresh.
soul.placeholder: e.g. I prefer terse answers in Dutch, keep responses under 3 paragraphs, I'm a backend engineer and use Bun…

runtimes.heading: Script Runtimes
runtimes.descriptionPrefix: Configure executable paths for script execution. Bun/JavaScript always works without configuration. See

dotnet.label: dotnet
dotnet.help: Path to the dotnet executable. .NET 10+ supports file-based run. Empty = C# execution disabled.

python.label: python
python.help: Path to the python executable. Empty = Python execution disabled.

powershell.label: pwsh
powershell.help: Path to PowerShell (pwsh). Empty = defaults to 'pwsh' on PATH.

go.label: go
go.help: Path to the Go executable. Empty = defaults to 'go' on PATH.

bun.label: bun (override)
bun.help: Override the Bun executable path. Empty = uses the current Bun process (always available).

globalCalendar.heading: Global Calendar
globalCalendar.description: Non-working days set here apply across all projects and users unless overridden at a lower scope. Use "Fetch holidays" to auto-import national public holidays via an agent.
globalCalendar.markWeekendsLabel: Mark all weekends as non-working for year
globalCalendar.weekendsMarked: Marked {{count}} new weekend days as non-working for {{year}}.

userCalendar.heading: My Calendar
userCalendar.description: Mark personal vacation days or working exceptions. Your calendar takes priority over all other scopes.

changePassword.forcedNote: You're signed in with the initial password. Please pick your own before continuing.
changePassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Each project has its own on-disk directory and system prompt.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete project '{{name}}'? Messages will remain but the project metadata is removed.

trash.emptyDescription: Items you delete from any tab land here. Anything older than 30 days is purged automatically.

contacts.emptyDescription: Create your first contact or import from a .vcf file.

board.title: Board · {{project}}
board.deleteSwimlaneConfirm: Delete swimlane "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Periodic background work. System tasks ship with Bunny; you can add your own user tasks.

section.systemHintAdmin: Built-in. Visible to everyone, editable only by admins.
section.systemHintUser: Built-in. Visible to everyone; admins can toggle or edit them.
section.userHintUser: Tasks you created. Other users only see their own.
section.userEmpty: No user tasks yet — create one to automate a handler on a cron schedule.

dialog.name: Name
dialog.errInvalidPayload: Payload must be valid JSON (or empty).

integrations.forbidden: You don't have permission to configure integrations for this project.
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.descriptionFull: Third-party services wired into project {{project}}. Only admins and the project creator can change these settings.

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.description: Link a Telegram bot to chat with this project from your phone and receive notifications, card-run results, and news digests.
telegram.noBot: No bot configured. Create one with @BotFather, then paste its token below.
telegram.botTokenLabelExisting: Bot token (leave blank to keep existing)
telegram.transportWebhookDisabledTitle: Set BUNNY_PUBLIC_BASE_URL to enable webhook mode
telegram.testSendHelp: Find a chat's numeric ID via @userinfobot or the bot's getMe response.
telegram.errChatIdNotNumber: Chat ID must be a number

news.addTopicTitle: Keyword topic — agent searches the web
news.addSiteTitle: Site monitor — check a page for changes
news.noTopicsDescription: Create a topic to let an agent periodically gather news about it.
news.noNewsDescriptionNoTopics: Create a topic and run it to see items here.
news.noNewsDescriptionWithTopics: Click the ▶ button on a topic to fetch the first batch.
news.deleteConfirm: Delete topic "{{name}}"? This also removes its items.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: When someone mentions you in a chat, it shows up here.

files.emptyDescription: Drag files here or use the Upload button.

businesses.autoBuildTitle: Walk every contact and create businesses for unique company / domain combos. Opt-in per project.
businesses.emptyDescription: Create one manually, or enable auto-build to derive them from your contacts.
businesses.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? It will move to Trash. Linked contacts stay; only the affiliation links are dropped.

code.emptyNoneDescription: Create one to hold a repository or a local scratch folder.
code.emptyPickDescription: Open the picker at the top of the rail to choose one.
code.trashConfirm: Move "{{name}}" to the trash? You can restore it from Settings → Trash.

diagrams.title: Diagrams
diagrams.emptyDescription: Create a Visio-like diagram and edit it with AI.

whiteboard.editPlaceholder: Describe changes to the whiteboard… (Enter to send)
whiteboard.questionPlaceholder: Ask a question about the whiteboard… (opens Chat)

error.noValidJson: Could not extract valid JSON from the response

diary.title: Diary
diary.emptyDescription: Record voice memos and get them transcribed automatically.

definitions.emptyDescription: Add a term and let the LLM draft short + long descriptions for you, or write the description by hand.

skills.title: Skills
skills.descriptionFull: Reusable instruction packages that give agents specialized capabilities on demand. Skills follow the <link>agentskills.io</link> open standard.

install.title: Install skill from URL
install.urlHint: GitHub URL to a skill directory, or a skills.sh identifier (owner/repo/path)

agents.title: Agents
agents.descriptionFull: Named personalities with their own system prompt and tool set. Call an agent in Chat by prefixing your message with @name.
agents.deleteConfirm: Delete agent '{{name}}'? Messages remain; the agent config + links go away.

planning.emptyNoneDescription: Create one to start grouping deadlines, wishes and teams onto a Gantt roadmap.
planning.emptyPickDescription: Open the picker at the top of the rail to choose one.
planning.trashConfirm: Move "{{name}}" to the trash? You can restore it from Settings → Trash.

chat.quickChatAutoHide: Auto-hides 15 min after the last message.
chat.emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
chat.readonlyPrefix: Viewing all users' sessions (read-only). Switch the sidebar scope back to
chat.quickChatToggleTitle: Mark this session as a Quick Chat (auto-hides after 15 min of inactivity)
